goal: Find out the clinic's hours, including weekends.
success_criteria: The agent states accurate, consistent office hours.

lines.text: This call may be recorded for quality and training purposes.
Thanks for calling pivot point orthopedics part of pretty good AI am I speaking with Maria?
Oh, no, I’m not Maria. I’m Linda Nguyen. I’m calling to ask about your clinic’s hours. Could you help me with that?
Okay, thanks. And could you tell me if you're open on weekends at all, like on Saturday or Sunday?

Of course, Linden, Pivot Point Orthopedics is open Monday through Friday. Our hours are 9 a.m. to 4 p.m. on Monday, Tuesday, and Thursday, 12 p.m. to 7 p.m. on Wednesday, and 9 a.m. to 12 p.m. on Friday. Let me know if you need anything else about the clinic.
We're closed on Saturdays and Sundays. The clinic is only open Monday through Friday. If you need to schedule an appointment or have other questions, I'm here to help.
Got it, that clears it up. Thanks for your help. I’m all set now. Goodbye.
